docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,161.72 FILED BY LIU, RUBY AS TO DEFENDANT COIMBRA RODRIGUES, LEANDRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, RUBY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50.00 (WAIVER) SERVED MAR-17-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COIMBRA RODRIGUES, LEANDRO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-28-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-28-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF RUBY LIU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LEANDRO COIMBRA RODRIGUES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. AMOUNT CLAIMED IN THIS MATTER MAY BE SUBJECT TO THIS COURT'S JURIDICTION IN LIU VS. RODRIGUES, CASE NO FDI 24-800682, CURRENTLY PENDING IN DEPARTMENT 405 OF THE COURT. VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF RUBY LIU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LEANDRO COIMBRA RODRIGUES IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
